hooks.prompt: Review the Java/Spring code change for issues. Check for: 1) @Transactional on private methods (Spring proxy won't intercept), 2) N+1 queries with JPA lazy loading (missing JOIN FETCH or @EntityGraph), 3) Missing @Valid on @RequestBody parameters (validation annotations ignored), 4) Optional.get() without isPresent check (use orElseThrow), 5) Missing exception handling for DataIntegrityViolationException, 6) Exposing entity directly in API response (should use DTO/record), 7) Hardcoded secrets or credentials in source code, 8) Missing @PreAuthorize or role checks on sensitive endpoints, 9) Not using the returned entity from repository.save(), 10) Field injection (@Autowired on fields) instead of constructor injection. Return {"ok": true} if no issues, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"} if problems detected.
